parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const q = ($json.query || '').trim(); const limit = Number($json.limit || 8); const payload = { page_size: Math.max(1, Math.min(20, limit)), sorts: [{ property: 'last_seen', direction: 'descending' }] }; const active = { property: 'status', select: { equals: 'active' } }; if (!q) { payload.filter = active; return payload; } payload.filter = { and: [active, { or: [ { property: 'Name', title: { contains: q } }, { property: 'summary', rich_text: { contains: q } }, { property: 'type', select: { equals: q } } ] }] }; return payload; })() }}
